meaning: n.绫讳汉鐚縜dj.浼间汉绫荤殑
examples: Man evolved from the anthropoid ape.
Considered a possible ancestor to both anthropoid apes and humans.
If our early anthropoid ancestors had not succeeded in migrating from Asia to Africa, we simply wouldn't exist.
The robots were the Roomba, a disc-shaped autonomous vacuum cleaner, and four anthropoid machines of varying degrees of humanness.
